name: Axe Ruby Raider
tips: Part of a group fight — prioritize the most dangerous variant
AoE damage is effective against Raider packs

name: Brute Ruby Raider
patterns: Highest damage of the Ruby Raider variants
tips: Focus this one first — hits hardest
Block heavily on its attack turns

name: Bygone Effigy
tips: Bring scaling damage to keep up with its buffs
Block-heavy approach helps survive big hits

name: Byrdonis
tips: One of the hardest Act 1 elites
Need strong Block cards before attempting
Weak helps reduce damage significantly
Don't fight below 60% HP unless deck is strong
Consider skipping if deck isn't ready

name: Ceremonial Beast
tips: Doom stacking is effective against it
Need to outpace its scaling
Front-load damage early before it ramps up

name: Chomper
patterns: Can chomp for large single-hit damage
tips: Block heavily on attack turns
Use debuffs like Weak to reduce damage

name: Crossbow Ruby Raider
tips: Lower HP but hits multiple times
Consider killing this first to reduce incoming hits

name: Cubex Construct
patterns: Alternates between attack and defense phases
tips: Time your burst damage for when it's not blocking
Vulnerability helps punch through its defenses

name: Doormaker
tips: Endgame boss — needs fully built deck
All scaling synergies should be online
Burst damage windows are critical

name: Exoskeleton
tips: Vulnerable helps cut through armor
Can be very dangerous in groups

name: Flyconid
tips: Watch for multi-attacks
AoE effective when they appear in groups

name: Fogmog
tips: Block-heavy turns needed
Straightforward fight if you have enough defense

name: Fuzzy Wurm Crawler
tips: Standard fight — good for learning mechanics
Use as an opportunity to set up powers

name: Inklet
tips: AoE is very effective
Focus weakest first to reduce incoming damage

name: Knowledge Demon
tips: Requires offensive play — can't turtle
Must outdamage its healing
Dangerous Doom application can kill you if ignored

name: Leaf Slime (Medium)
patterns: Splits into smaller slimes on death
tips: AoE damage is effective
Plan for the split when timing kills

name: Leaf Slime (Small)
tips: Kill quickly before they multiply

name: Louse Progenitor
tips: Kill the progenitor first to stop spawning
AoE helps manage the swarm

name: Nibbit
tips: Easy early fight
Good for learning mechanics

name: Phrog Parasite
tips: Front-load damage if possible
Doom stacking and Poison are effective
Don't let the fight drag on

name: Shrinker Beetle
tips: Kill quickly to avoid Strength loss
Block-heavy approach works

name: Soul Fysh
patterns: Uses Beckon (1-cost status card, -6 HP if discarded)
Gains Intangible on turn 5 of pattern rotation
Turn 4 of each pattern is optimal damage window
tips: Don't discard Beckon cards — take the HP loss instead
Burst damage on turn 4 of each cycle
Intangible on turn 5 means you can't damage it

name: Thieving Hopper
tips: Kill quickly to minimize gold loss
Prioritize over other enemies in multi-fights

name: Tracker Ruby Raider
tips: Part of group fights — use AoE
Medium threat level among Raiders

name: Twig Slime (Medium)
tips: Watch for damage spikes
AoE helps manage splits

name: Twig Slime (Small)
tips: Simple enemy, focus on preserving HP

name: Vantom
patterns: Has multiple attack patterns that cycle
tips: Need strong scaling (Strength/Poison/Doom)
Block cards essential for surviving big hits
Plan your route to arrive with a good deck
Rest before boss if possible

name: Vine Shambler
patterns: Can be tanky if not dealt with quickly
tips: Apply Vulnerable to cut through Block
Don't let it stack too much defense

name: Wriggler
tips: AoE effective
Easy fight unless you lack multi-target damage

name: Ruby Raiders
patterns: Mix of melee and ranged attacks
tips: AoE damage is key
Focus the Brute first for damage reduction
Can be overwhelming without multi-target cards

name: Chompers
tips: Heavy Block needed
AoE helps thin the group

name: Exoskeletons
tips: Vulnerable is crucial
Can be a tough fight without armor-piercing

name: Inklets
tips: AoE clears them efficiently

name: Nibbits
tips: Easy early encounter

name: Overgrowth Crawlers
tips: Standard Act 1 fight
AoE helps manage the group

name: Dense Vegetation
tips: Triggered from an event choice
Be prepared before choosing to fight

name: Slimes (Weak)
tips: One of the easiest encounters
Good for preserving HP

name: Nibbits (Weak)
tips: Very easy fight

name: Fuzzy Wurm Crawler (Weak)
tips: Easy fight — take minimal damage

name: Shrinker Beetle (Weak)
tips: Still watch for Strength reduction debuff

name: Exoskeletons (Weak)
tips: Easier than normal variant but still has armor

name: Thieving Hopper (Weak)
tips: Still steals gold — kill fast

name: Ceremonial Beast (Boss Encounter)
patterns: Full boss encounter with Ceremonial Beast
tips: See Ceremonial Beast for detailed strategy

name: Vantom (Boss Encounter)
